question: Consider a standby system with two identical valves each with constant failure rate $\lambda=10^{-5}$ failures/hours. The probability $\mathrm{p}_{\mathrm{s}}$ that the switch $S$ will activate the standby valve is 0.995 . What is the reliability of the system at time $\mathrm{t}=8760 \mathrm{~h}$ (or one year)?
